info.title: KCDF Parents Platform — API
info.description: REST API for the KCDF Parents platform. Serves Parent App and Admin Portal.

post.description: Authenticate user with username and password

patch.description: Elevated Admin only - Change program status (active/inactive)

post.description: Elevated Admin only - Lock session to prevent further attendance changes
Super Admin only - Promote a member to admin

put.description: Super Admin only - Update admin role or status

get.description: Retrieve invitation details using an invitation code (public endpoint)

post.description: Register a new user by accepting an invitation (public endpoint)
